problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Homomorphic. Homomorphic encryption for private computation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
